raw_response: The MacBook Pro with M4 Pro is an excellent choice for data analysis due to its powerful 24GB RAM and robust Apple M4 Pro processor, ensuring smooth performance even with complex datasets. Its 14.2-inch mini-LED XDR display offers stunning visuals, while the 17-hour battery life supports long work sessions. Although it's pricey at $1999, your quality sensitivity is low, making this high-performance laptop a worthwhile investment despite its limitations in macOS compatibility and non-upgradeable RAM.
